text: Did you go to a party?
Yes, I did. No, I did not.
Good morning, Erica! How was your weekend?
It was special! On Saturday, I went to a party.
Nice! Did you enjoy the party?
Yes, I did! It was a lot of fun. And you? What did you do?
I visited my parents. Where did you go on Sunday?
I visited a museum. It was a special weekend.
I went to a party on Saturday.
I visited a museum on Sunday.
Yes, I did. It was a lot of fun.

Hello. Let me tell you about my weekend. It was a special weekend. On Saturday, I went to a party at my friend's house. There were many people. We ate good food and we listened to music. I enjoyed it a lot. On Sunday, I visited a museum in the city. I walked for two hours and I saw beautiful art. It was a calm day. In the evening, I called my daughter. We talked for one hour. It was a memorable weekend, and it was a lot of fun.

Hi. I want to tell you about my last weekend. On Saturday morning, I stayed at home and I read a book. In the afternoon, I visited my parents. We had lunch together and we talked a lot. On Sunday, my wife and I went to a small party. We met old friends and we enjoyed the evening. I did not work, so I relaxed. It was a quiet weekend, but it was special for me. I felt happy and calm.
First, I ask: How was your weekend? Second, I ask: What did you do? Third, my friend answers: I went to a party. Fourth, I ask: Did you enjoy it? Fifth, my friend answers: Yes, I did. It was fun.
Did you go to a party?
What did you do on Sunday?
Where did you go last weekend?
I went to a party on Saturday.
I visited a museum on Sunday.
Yes, I did. It was a lot of fun.
